repair_candidate.summary: Repair open canonical PR #79655 by preserving the contributor's completed Codex Responses tool replay pruning intent while addressing the concrete ClawSweeper/CI blockers. Keep scope limited to completed native Codex Responses replay pruning and active tail preservation.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(openai-codex): repair completed Responses replay pruning
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- repair #79655's completed native Codex Responses tool replay pruning change
- preserve active tail tool continuation behavior while pruning already-consumed replay items
- keep the fix scoped to the OpenAI transport replay surface and focused regression coverage

## Credit
This repair carries forward the implementation intent and contributor credit from source PR #79655 by @fanfanliu964-web.

## Validation
- pnpm test src/agents/openai-transport-stream.responses-tool-replay.test.ts src/agents/openai-transport-stream.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- git diff --check
- Codex /review before final applicator update

Refs #79655.
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for @fanfanliu964-web from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/79655.
Mention that the repair is based on source PR #79655 and keeps the contributor's replay-pruning approach where possible.
